ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "order_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the order (e.g., Low, High) */,
  "order_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items ordered */,
  "sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "ship_mode" TEXT /* Mode of shipping used for the order */,
  "profit" REAL /* Total profit made from the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping the order */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer who placed the order */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the customer resides */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer is located */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Segment to which the customer belongs (e.g., Consumer, Corporate) */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product ordered */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "order_total" REAL /* Total amount of the order before discount */,
  "order_total_after_discount" REAL /* Total amount of the order after discount */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used to pay for the order (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending, Failed) */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the order */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who handled the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_ship_mode FOREIGN KEY ("ship_mode") REFERENCES shipping_methods ("ship_mode")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category to which the product belongs (e.g., Office Supplies) */,
  "product_sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_container" TEXT /* Type of container used for the product */,
  "product_base_margin" REAL /* Base margin percentage for the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "product_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "product_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  "product_supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  "product_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the customer resides */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer is located */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Segment to which the customer belongs (e.g., Consumer, Corporate) */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_city" TEXT /* City where the customer resides */,
  "customer_postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer */,
  "customer_credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer (for credit risk assessment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_methods" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping method */,
  "ship_mode" TEXT /* Mode of shipping (e.g., Regular Air, Delivery Truck) */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the shipping method */,
  "shipping_description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping method */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for the shipping method (e.g., UPS, FedEx) */,
  "estimated_delivery_days" INTEGER /* Estimated number of days for delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status update */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being tracked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the status was updated */,
  "status_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the status update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product associated with this analytics record */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the product */,
  "total_profit" REAL /* Total profit generated from the product */,
  "total_quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Total quantity sold of the product */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the analytics data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for the analytics data */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Customer segment for the analytics data */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Product category for the analytics data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_analytics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Rate of the discount (e.g., 0.04 for 4%) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  "minimum_order_amount" REAL /* Minimum order amount required to apply the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in inventory */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the product should be reordered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was last updated */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for restocking the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
